enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of youth.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Paiyaa, this song highlights the protagonist's joyful moments and carefree attitude during his journey.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Karthik and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 22, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Suthudhe Suthudhe Boomi, the upbeat tempo and lively lyrics encapsulate the carefree essence of youth and celebration. Featured in the movie Paiyaa, the song serves as a backdrop to joyous moments, enhancing the film's vibrant narrative. The infectious energy of Karthik's vocals, combined with Yuvan's dynamic composition, evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This track is perfect for any festive occasion, inviting listeners to dance and celebrate life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Suthudhe Suthudhe Boomi from the Paiyaa soundtrack is a vibrant celebration of life and love, brought to life by the melodious voice of Karthik. With Yuvan's infectious beats, this song captures the essence of joy and festivity, making it a perfect addition to any celebration. Experience the energy and charm that makes this track a standout in Tamil cinema!
stanzaMeanings: This earth is spinning, is it enough, is it enough, God?
Ra ra ra ra Radhe Radhe, beautiful Radhe. Talking and talking in the sky, old Radhe.
For some reason, this feeling is like a magical garden in my heart.
For some reason, this dance is like a swing in my heart today.
This earth is spinning, is it enough, is it enough, God?
You smile and smile, in the moment you are growing.
Why are you doing these killings, saying it's for goodness?
Here and there, you are spreading your beauty, what can I say about your charm?
In the open field, I am waking up with a bang.
This earth is spinning, is it enough, is it enough, God?
My heart is melting, I see it going away, I see it.
Is this moment going to continue? I am asking you, I am asking you.
What is this, is it the spring season today? Will this moment still fade away?
Will such a night come here, will such a memory be forgotten?
This earth is spinning, is it enough, is it enough, God?
Ra ra ra ra Radhe Radhe, beautiful Radhe. Talking and talking in the sky, old Radhe.
Your beauty from the sky is shining bright, making me enjoy it.
Little stars come to stay in your embrace, they shine in the world.
